lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਾਤੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜਸੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਕਹੇ ॥੨॥੧੭॥੧੦੩॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa pooran prabh daate niramal jas naanak daas kahe |2|17|103|
lines.english: Be merciful, O Perfect God, Great Giver, that slave Nanak may chant Your immaculate Praises. ||2||17||103||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਲਹੀ ਤੇ ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ਰਾਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: sulahee te naaraaein raakh |
lines.english: The Lord saved me from Sulhi Khan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਲਹੀ ਕਾ ਹਾਥੁ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਪਹੁਚੈ ਸੁਲਹੀ ਹੋਇ ਮੂਆ ਨਾਪਾਕੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sulahee kaa haath kahee na pahuchai sulahee hoe mooaa naapaak |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The emperor did not succeed in his plot, and he died in disgrace. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੰਦਾ ਚਿਤਵਤ ਚਿਤਵਤ ਪਚਿਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਚਿਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਦੀਨਾ ਧਾਕੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mandaa chitavat chitavat pachiaa jin rachiaa tin deenaa dhaak |1|
lines.english: Plotting and planning evil, he was destroyed. The One who created him, gave him a push.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਢਿ ਕੁਠਾਰੁ ਖਸਮਿ ਸਿਰੁ ਕਾਟਿਆ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਹੋਇ ਗਇਆ ਹੈ ਖਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaadt kutthaar khasam sir kaattiaa khin meh hoe geaa hai khaak |
lines.english: The Lord and Master raised His axe, and chopped off his head; in an instant, he was reduced to dust. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤ੍ਰ ਮੀਤ ਧਨੁ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਰਹਿਓ ਸੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਗਇਆ ਸਭ ਭਾਈ ਸਾਕੁ ॥
lines.translit: putr meet dhan kichhoo na rahio su chhodd geaa sabh bhaaee saak |
lines.english: Of his sons, friends and wealth, nothing remains; he departed, leaving behind all his brothers and relatives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਨ ਕਾ ਕੀਨੋ ਪੂਰਨ ਵਾਕੁ ॥੨॥੧੮॥੧੦੪॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak tis prabh balihaaree jin jan kaa keeno pooran vaak |2|18|104|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I am a sacrifice to God, who fulfilled the word of His slave. ||2||18||104||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਮਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅੰਤਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਪਨਾ ਥਾਟੁ ਬਨਾਇਓ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: aad madh prabh ant suaamee apanaa thaatt banaaeo aap |
lines.english: In the beginning, in the middle and in the end, God is our only Lord and Master. He Himself fashioned His Creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪੂਰੀ ਸੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kee pooree sev |
lines.english: Perfect is service to the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਰਾਸਿ ਕੀਆ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap varatai suaamee kaaraj raas keea guradev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Our Lord and Master Himself is Himself all-pervading. The Divine Guru has resolved all my affairs. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਸੇਵਕ ਕੀ ਆਪੇ ਰਾਖੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮੇਰੇ ਕੋ ਵਡ ਪਰਤਾਪੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: apane sevak kee aape raakhai prabh mere ko vadd parataap |1|
lines.english: He Himself saves His servant. Great is the glorious grandeur of my God! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਵਸਿ ਕੀਨੑੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਗਲੇ ਜੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham paramesur satigur vas keenae jin sagale jant |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord is the True Guru; all beings are in His power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਜਪਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਮੰਤ ॥੨॥੧੯॥੧੦੫॥
lines.translit: charan kamal naanak saranaaee raam naam jap niramal mant |2|19|105|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of His Lotus Feet, chanting the Lord's Name, the immaculate Mantra. ||2||19||105||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਪ ਪਾਪ ਤੇ ਰਾਖੇ ਆਪ ॥
lines.translit: taap paap te raakhe aap |
lines.english: He Himself protects me from suffering and sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਹਸਤ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਦੀਨੇ ਜਗਤ ਉਧਾਰ ਨਵ ਖੰਡ ਪ੍ਰਤਾਪ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa hasat prabh deene jagat udhaar nav khandd prataap |
lines.english: Granting His Mercy, God has extended His Hands. He is the Emancipator of the World; His glorious radiance pervades the nine continents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੀਤਲ ਭਏ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨੀ ਲਾਗੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਹਿਰਦੇ ਮਹਿ ਜਾਪ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: seetal bhe gur charanee laage raam naam hirade meh jaap |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Falling at the Guru's Feet, I am cooled and soothed; I meditate on the Lord's Name within my heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸੁਖ ਅਨਦ ਪ੍ਰਵੇਸਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਬੁਝੀ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਸਚੁ ਧ੍ਰਾਪ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dukh binase sukh anad pravesaa trisan bujhee man tan sach dhraap |1|
lines.english: My pain has been dispelled, and peace and pleasure have come; my desire is quenched, and my mind and body are truly satisfied. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲ ਭੈ ਭੰਜਨ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਤ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਲਾਪ ॥੨॥੨੦॥੧੦੬॥
lines.translit: bhagat vachhal bhai bhanjan suaamee gun gaavat naanak aalaap |2|20|106|
lines.english: He is the Lover of His devotees, the Destroyer of fear; Nanak sings and chants the Glorious Praises of his Lord and Master. ||2||20||106||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਾਥ ਕੋ ਨਾਥੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਸਮਰਥਾ ਸਗਲ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕੋ ਮਾਈ ਬਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: anaath ko naath saran samarathaa sagal srisatt ko maaee baap |
lines.english: He is the Master of the masterless, All-powerful to give Sanctuary. He is the Mother and Father of the whole Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪਛਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis te upajiaa tiseh pachhaan |
lines.english: Acknowledge the One, from whom You originated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਬਡ ਭਾਗੀ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਸੁਘੜੁ ਸੁਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa bhettio badd bhaagee antarajaamee sugharr sujaan |
lines.english: I met the Perfect Guru, by great good fortune, and so found the wise and all-knowing Lord, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਕੁਸਲ ਖੇਮ ਹੋਏ ਕਲਿਆਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paarabraham paramesar dhiaaeaa kusal khem hoe kaliaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meditating on the Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord, I have found peace, pleasure and salvation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਥ ਦੇਇ ਰਾਖੇ ਕਰਿ ਅਪਨੇ ਬਡ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਨਿਮਾਣਿਆ ਕੋ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haath dee raakhe kar apane badd samarath nimaaniaa ko maan |1|
lines.english: He gave me His Hand, and making me His own, He saved me; He is absolutely all-powerful, the honor of the dishonored. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭੈ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਗਏ ਖਿਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਅੰਧਕਾਰ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੇ ਚਾਨਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bhai binas ge khin bheetar andhakaar pragatte chaanaan |
lines.english: Doubt and fear have been dispelled in an instant, and in the darkness, the Divine Light shines forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਆਰਾਧੈ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਜਾਈਐ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥੨॥੨੧॥੧੦੭॥
lines.translit: saas saas aaraadhai naanak sadaa sadaa jaaeeai kurabaan |2|21|107|
lines.english: With each and every breath, Nanak worships and adores the Lord; forever and ever, I am a sacrifice to Him. ||2||21||107||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਵੈ ਥਾਵ ਰਖੇ ਗੁਰ ਸੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: dovai thaav rakhe gur soore |
lines.english: Both here and hereafter, the Mighty Guru protects me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤ ਪਲਤ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਸਵਾਰੇ ਕਾਰਜ ਹੋਏ ਸਗਲੇ ਪੂਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat paarabraham savaare kaaraj hoe sagale poore |1| rahaau |
lines.english: God has embellished this world and the next for me, and all my affairs are perfectly resolved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜੇ ਮਜਨੁ ਹੋਵਤ ਸਾਧੂ ਧੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japat sukh sahaje majan hovat saadhoo dhoore |
lines.english: Chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, I have found peace and poise, bathing in the dust of the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣ ਰਹੇ ਥਿਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਕੇ ਮਿਟੇ ਬਿਸੂਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan rahe thit paaee janam maran ke mitte bisoore |1|
lines.english: Comings and goings have ceased, and I have found stability; the pains of birth and death are eradicated. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭੈ ਤਰੇ ਛੁਟੇ ਭੈ ਜਮ ਕੇ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਏਕੁ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bhai tare chhutte bhai jam ke ghatt ghatt ek rahiaa bharapoore |
lines.english: I cross over the ocean of doubt and fear, and the fear of death is gone; the One Lord is permeating and pervading in each and every heart.
